ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridings" (
  "riding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each riding */,
  "riding_name" TEXT /* Name of the riding */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province where the riding is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the riding is located */,
  "riding_population" INTEGER /* Population of the riding */,
  "riding_area" REAL /* Area of the riding in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("riding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridings_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridings_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the candidate */,
  "candidate_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, provincial, municipal) */,
  "election_turnout" REAL /* Turnout percentage of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election where the result belongs */,
  "riding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the riding where the election took place */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate participating in the election */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "elected" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate was elected or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_riding_id FOREIGN KEY ("riding_id") REFERENCES ridings ("riding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_results, edit_results) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view_results) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
